name: rails-agent-skills
description: 40+ specialized Rails development skills via MCP — TDD, code review, DDD, engines, Hotwire, and more. Skills encode conventions and workflow patterns so AI assistants deliver higher-quality Rails code.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: Discover public Rails Agent Skills before loading one with use_skill

tools.name: use_skill
tools.description: Load and return the full SKILL.md instructions plus structured metadata for a named Rails development skill
